commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `GOG_HELP=agent` compact root help, structural and live gog-vs-gws eval scripts, scenarios, tests, docs, Make targets, skill guidance, and changelog notes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds evaluation infrastructure and a new help mode rather than reporting a broken current-main behavior. The PR body gives concrete terminal reproduction paths for both the structural and live suites.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide draft readiness and acceptance of the opt-in credentialed live-eval boundary; there is no narrow automated repair target.
